title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・限界の先へ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Otherworldly Front-Runner does it again!
Silence Suzuka takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
She's the best runner of her generation! Maybe
even in all of racing history!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I-I did it! I made it into the lead!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I saw it... I saw the scenery from the lead of the
autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I could hear everyone's heartbeats, then I pushed
past them all... And waiting for me there was...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The most serene and beautiful scenery I've seen in
a race yet!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I ran today! Thank goodness I was able
to!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... I knew I would be able to find my
way back to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so ends the autumn Tenno Sho. The cheers
from the audience ring out for quite some time.
